notes: DRG cost-table missing-value imputation (private_*/paed_*/cost_*/ave_charge_* sentinel defaults) plus the obstetric-admission ARRAY/substr diagnosis-code scan. The 7 DRG/cost rows are the real first data rows of the repo's own drgcost_new.csv (thousands separators stripped for plain-numeric datalines; values otherwise unchanged), inlined so the bundle is self-contained (shipped runner uploads script text only). The private matern.npdc_inp linkage cohort is substituted with a 5-row mock admission cohort joined on drg. Imputation defaults and array-scan logic unchanged from source.
